prompt:
Generate a full-body, front-view portrait of character protagonist based on the following description, with a pure white background. The character should be centered in the image, occupying most of the frame. Gazing straight ahead. Standing with arms relaxed at sides. Natural expression.
Features: **主角形象描述提示词：**

Kaworu Nagisa, male teenager, full-body character design, extremely handsome and beautiful with delicate features and clear pale skin, outstanding elegant temperament. Silver-gray short hair styled naturally with soft layers framing his face. Striking red pupils with deep, ethereal gaze and mysterious gentle smile. Angelic facial features with refined bone structure, slender nose, and perfectly shaped lips. Pale porcelain skin with subtle luminous quality.

Wearing crisp white NERV uniform - white collared shirt with organization insignia, white jacket with clean lines, white pants, and polished black shoes. Slender graceful physique befitting his ethereal nature. Standing pose with serene composure, one hand slightly raised in a contemplative gesture, expressing his supernatural calmness and transcendent aura.

Anime style with Japanese manga aesthetics, bold ink outlines, halftone dot shadows, high contrast lighting with dramatic shadows creating mysterious atmosphere. NERV headquarters corridor background with industrial sci-fi elements, fluorescent lighting casting cool tones that enhance his otherworldly presence.

Character centered on pure white background, full-body view, no text, no symbols, no words. Emphasis on his angelic beauty, mysterious smile, calm demeanor, and the contrast between his divine appearance and the dark conspiracy surrounding NERV organization., very handsome, very beautiful, stunning, delicate features, symmetrical face, clear skin, attractive, full body, standing pose, arms relaxed at sides, pure white background, character centered, no text, no symbols, no garbled characters, no words
Style: anime
No text, no symbols, no watermark, no garbled characters, no words.
